description:
## v26.4.30-8eabfa

- fix(twitter): bypass PairIP startup checks (8eabfaf)
- feat(reddit): support 2026.17.0 share links (14c5b65)
- Add Reddit share link patches (3eca78e)
- fix: publish latest patch metadata on main (0166ccf)
- fix(worker): accept CalVer SHA release tags (7d45c38)
- ci: release CalVer patch bundles from tags (9c0c89e)
- fix(tiktok): rewrite share links at clipboard outputs (710ba62)
- fix: strip Threads share link query strings (4818fe0)
- fix: rewrite Threads clipboard share links (b0141ae)
- Revert "fix: rewrite Threads share extra text call sites" (6374658)
- Revert "fix: rewrite Threads bundle and charsequence extras" (482b725)
- fix: rewrite Threads bundle and charsequence extras (dbc695a)
- fix: rewrite Threads share extra text call sites (c879b21)
- fix: rewrite and sanitize Threads share text (665c6e0)
- feat: add TikTok and Threads share domain patches (bb587de)
- fix: add missing instruction helpers (a0b7b70)
- chore: adopt repo metadata and slim release workflow (742fc9c)
- feat: add instagram share domain patch (3b19715)
